examples: The landlord pays cleaners who come daily, and there is a dingy shared washroom where residents can clean their belongings.
Shaw took me to his dingy office.
My older brother and I lived with Mom in a dingy multi-family house in Detroit.
In New York City, you can still have small, dingy apartment buildings near flashy new condominiums.
Dingy wallpaper and junk piled higgledy-piggledy are out, bright lighting and neat displays are in.
